title: Opening for Category Manager at Miniklub South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Miniklub South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Miniklub South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Miniklub South Asia Partners:
Miniklub South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub South Asia Partners!
